meta.incident: RabbitMQ broker rabbit-01 goes down: publish confirm timeouts -> connection EOF -> reconnect fails (connection refused) -> all job queues halt and in-flight messages are lost, amid recurring deprecated-endpoint distractor

ground_truth.desc: Publish confirms stalling before connection drops
Broker TCP connection closed with EOF
Reconnect attempts rejected by broker host

ground_truth.needle: rabbitmq reconnect failed all attempts exhausted

ground_truth.desc: Unacked messages dropped on worker shutdown

evidence.text: time="2026-05-07T10:00:17.778Z" level=warn msg="rabbitmq channel prefetch nack rate=0.12 queue=email_send" threshold=0.10
time="2026-05-07T10:00:20.001Z" level=warn msg="rabbitmq publish confirm timeout queue=email_send after_ms=5000"
time="2026-05-07T10:00:21.112Z" level=warn msg="rabbitmq publish confirm timeout queue=image_resize after_ms=5000"

time="2026-05-07T10:00:24.445Z" level=error msg="rabbitmq reconnect attempt=1 host=rabbit-01 err=\"dial tcp <ip>:5672: connect: connection refused\""
time="2026-05-07T10:00:25.556Z" level=error msg="rabbitmq reconnect attempt=2 host=rabbit-01 err=\"dial tcp <ip>:5672: connect: connection refused\""
time="2026-05-07T10:00:27.778Z" level=error msg="rabbitmq reconnect failed all attempts exhausted host=rabbit-01"
time="2026-05-07T10:00:28.889Z" level=error msg="job processing halted: no broker connection queue=email_send pending=34"
time="2026-05-07T10:00:30.001Z" level=error msg="job processing halted: no broker connection queue=image_resize pending=12"
time="2026-05-07T10:00:33.334Z" level=error msg="in-flight job lost: worker shutdown with unacked messages count=7 queue=email_send"
time="2026-05-07T10:00:35.556Z" level=error msg="in-flight job lost: worker shutdown with unacked messages count=3 queue=image_resize"
time="2026-05-07T10:00:36.667Z" level=error msg="health check failed: broker unreachable liveness=false"
